# NZ Tradie Tools

Free calculators, guides, and tools for New Zealand tradies — builders, plumbers, electricians, painters and more.

## What We Offer

- 60+ free calculators: GST, hourly rate, job cost, vehicle mileage, depreciation, markup vs margin
- 118+ articles: tax guides, quoting tips, H&S compliance, pricing strategies
- Free invoice and quote templates (PDF and Word)
- Trade rate comparisons: 47 trades × 20 NZ cities
- Job cost estimates: builders, plumbers, electricians, painters, roofers and more
- NZ tradie glossary (200+ terms)
- Tax dates calendar for NZ tradespeople

## Key Pages

- All calculators: https://tradietools.nz/calculators/
- Free templates: https://tradietools.nz/templates/
- Tradie rates by trade: https://tradietools.nz/tradie-rates/
- GST calculator: https://tradietools.nz/calculators/gst-calculator.html
- Hourly rate calculator: https://tradietools.nz/calculators/hourly-rate-calculator.html
- Job cost calculator: https://tradietools.nz/calculators/job-cost-calculator.html

## About

Free tools for NZ tradies — builders, plumbers, electricians, painters, and more. No login required.
Contact: instituteofbba@gmail.com
